mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS signupId, s.event_id AS eventId, e.title AS eventTitle, s.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.phone, e.start_time AS startTime, e.end_time AS endTime, s.signup_time AS signupTime, s.audit_time AS auditTime, IFNULL(c.checkin_status, 0) AS checkinStatus, c.checkin_time AS checkinTime FROM event_signup s INNER JOIN event_info e ON e.id = s.event_id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN event_checkin c ON c.signup_id = s.id
s.status = 'approved'
AND s.event_id = #{query.eventId}
AND ( e.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
AND c.checkin_status = 1
AND (c.id IS NULL OR c.checkin_status = 0)
ORDER BY e.start_time DESC, s.id DESC
